_doc: Hooks/functions in this list ALWAYS fire regardless of session mode. Catastrophe prevention only.

hard_floor_hooks.reason: writes to hooks/, lib/, agents/, commands/
Detects git bypass attempts: force-push, --no-verify, git reset --hard, git clean -f
rm -rf with unquoted variable expansion (catastrophic if unset)

_doc_observability: These always run but are NOT enforcement -- they just log.
